User.title: User Profile
User.description: Premium user profile containing identity, current balance, and stats.

avatar.description: Moniker of the chosen badge avatar.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was last modified.

blocked.description: True if the user's account has been administratively suspended.

isSuspicious.description: True if flagged for suspected duplicate behavior or referral abuse.

ipAddress.description: Last recorded sign-up or sign-in IP address.

deviceFingerprint.description: Device hardware and browser capabilities seed fingerprint hash.

browserInfo.description: Browser details and HTTP User Agent signature.

email.description: Email address of the registered member.

emailVerified.description: Whether the email was verified with verification code.

lastClaimedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the user's last daily check-in.

claimStreak.description: Consecutive days the user has claimed staking yields.

dailyBonusEarnings.description: Cumulative earnings claimed from check-in yields.

user_id.description: Lowercase user ID for database matching.

full_name.description: Full name in lowercase or standard format used for DB matching.

password.description: Plaintext key or hashed key for authorization fallback check.

security_pin.description: 4-Digit security PIN used for resetting access credentials.

ReferralLog.title: Referral Activity Log
ReferralLog.description: Individual commission event generated when another member joins via referral.

id.description: Unique transaction ID of the referral.

timestamp.description: User-friendly date and time of the event.

refereeName.description: First name or full name of the newly onboarded referee member.

refereeId.description: User ID of the newly onboarded user.

source.description: Tracking source campaign moniker used during sign-up.

createdAt.description: Audit control server-side timestamp of write.

DailyReward.title: Daily Dividend Claim Record
DailyReward.description: Log of successful daily division claim with timing, amount, and current streak.

id.description: Unique identifier of the claim log.

Task.title: Social Media Task
Task.description: A task created by admin for users to complete on social media platforms.

TaskSubmission.title: Task Submission
TaskSubmission.description: A user's submission for a social media task with screenshot verification.

screenshot.description: Base64 encoded image or storage URL.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Social media tasks managed by admin.

/users/{userId}.description: Individual premium member dashboard configurations and balances.

/users/{userId}/referrals/{referralId}.description: Specific commissions settled for a user.

/users/{userId}/daily_rewards/{rewardId}.description: Logs of daily rewards claimed by this user.

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Administrative historical trailing ledger recorded on cloud nodes.

/security_logs/{logId}.description: Security and fraud detection activity logs tracked dynamically by the system.
